Transcrição Completa: 2 Selling Advertising

 

 

[00:00] "Hey guys, what's going on? So, I'm going to show you in every service that can be sold all of the different ways you could use the perfect cold video pitch in order to leverage new clients in your business."

 

[00:15] "The first one I'm going to start with is a video that I already did myself to land one of my top ticket clients. Uh, his name's Dan Lokach, and I'm going to show you how I sold him advertising services."

 

[00:28] "Uh it started off as a $5,000 consulting deal that turned into a $25,000 hands-on deal where if we make him 150k a day, he pays us 75k a month and if we make him 300k a day, he pays us out 150k a month."

 

[00:45] "So anyway, long story short, I'm going to show you the 8-minute video and I'm going to kind of pause it along the way and just kind of comment on it."

 

[00:54] "Most of you guys might not do this. I take it the additional step. I had a printer on hand and I took a photo of Dan and I printed it out. That way I could get additional attention. I just held it up in my hand here."

 

[01:08] "So anyway, long story short, let's start the video up."

 

[01:12] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: [Vídeo de pitch começa - segurando foto impressa]

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Apresentador segurando foto impressa do prospect (Dan Lokach) para capturar atenção, técnica de diferenciação visual

 

[01:15] "I printed off your face so I'd get your attention more than just other people who send you videos cuz I know you get these a lot. I'm sure you get pitched a ton. I love your video. Uh, fuck the haters. I completely agree with that this video."

 

[01:30] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Comentário do Instrutor - Alinhamento Cultural"

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Pausa no vídeo para explicação, apresentador mostrando dedo do meio, demonstração de alinhamento com valores do prospect

 

[01:32] "So I noticed Dan cusses a lot. So you see me hold up my middle finger and say fuck the haters. So I make a point to show that I had gone and actually watched some of his videos prior to just making this pitch like a bunch of other people will."

 

[01:48] "And I also wanted to resemble that I'm a part of his culture and can integrate into his existing set of values which is what I did there as he cusses a lot and almost said the same thing in his video."

 

[02:00] "Love your video. Uh fuck the haters. I completely agree with that. This video specifically is talking about making you more money. Things that I can see from the outside you're not doing. I come—"

 

[02:14] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Software Tip - Camtasia vs Loom"

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Demonstração de movimento de câmera na tela, comparação entre softwares de gravação, webcam se movendo dinamicamente pela tela

 

[02:16] "A lot of you guys when you're recording screen videos, I use the software called Camtasia instead of using Loom because it enables me to move my video around as you just saw there."

 

[02:28] "So, in this initial intro, before I really dive into the action, I just kind of move where I'm at on the screen around to keep people's attention."

 

[02:37] "From incredible background, I used to be Grant Cardone's marketer for 13 months."

 

[02:43] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Comentário - Estabelecendo Credibilidade"

 

NÚMEROS: 13 meses

 

VISUAL: Pausa explicativa destacando estratégia de construção de autoridade através de experiência passada

 

[02:45] "Talking about what I've done in the past in order to get people results to leverage into this deal."

 

[02:51] "Content machine, his entire team behind the scenes. I've since two and a half years ago, started my digital marketing agency. I work with people like Eric Ciri, guys, $150 million."

 

[03:05] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "PowerPoint de Clientes - Preparação Visual"

 

NÚMEROS: $150 milhões

 

VISUAL: Transição instantânea para apresentação PowerPoint já aberta, slides de portfólio de clientes, logos e fotos de clientes de alto nível

 

[03:07] "Now, notice that I don't have uh I don't have the little buffers in between where I have to go like search for my presentation. I already have it open. It's ready to go."

 

[03:18] "This actually happens to be from a presentation on a PowerPoint that I used at the stacking growth event out in Silicon Valley. Uh, shout out to Thomas M, Justin Woo."

 

[03:28] "But this specific PowerPoint ended up being used throughout my perfect cold video pitches because it showcased some of the different clients that I would work with and enabled me to have a visual aid while I'm talking about what I'm talking about."

 

[03:42] "So, I like to make sure that I have things that are visually stimulating so I keep the person's attention longer in the video. But notice how I have it ready. It's just it's just boom boom."

 

[03:52] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Slide com logo "Retro Fitness"

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Logo de cliente em destaque, apresentação profissional de portfólio

 

[03:54] "Retro Fitness. I help him drive franchise leads into his business."

 

[03:59] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Slide com foto de Armando Montalongo

 

NÚMEROS: $200 milhões por ano, 2006-2009, 27 funis

 

VISUAL: Foto profissional do cliente, credenciais de TV (A&E), números de faturamento destacados

 

[04:01] "I helped Armando Montalongo here. He was the original flipper on A&E in 2006 to 2009 anyway before everybody else hopped in the industry. Did $200 million a year coming in in traditional business. I had to build about 27 different funnels, help him with webinars and just kind of moderate."

 

[04:20] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Comentário - Estrutura de Apresentação"

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Pausa explicativa sobre formato bullet point, ênfase em clareza e velocidade de comunicação

 

[04:22] "Notice how when I'm talking about what I'm talking about with what I did for people, I'm just talking about what we did, the result. What we did, the result, what we did, the result."

 

[04:32] "But it's in bullet point format. I'm not uh saying uh or in or um I'm just here's what we did, this is the result. This is what we did. This is the result. Let's continue on the video."

 

[04:43] "And keeping it in traditional revenue. Julius Dean, he actually stayed in my place here the other day. Not that makes a big difference, but long story short—"

 

[04:52] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Whiteboard ao fundo: "Let's make you more money" + símbolo $

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Whiteboard estrategicamente posicionado no background, mensagem orientada a resultados, elemento de curiosidade visual

 

[04:54] "Notice how in the background there, I actually have on my whiteboard a sign that says, 'Let's make you more money.' And a money sign. Uh, just a little thing to have in the background. Also something that can generate curiosity."

 

[05:08] "The guy Tai Lopez hired me to be a consultant, taught in three of his courses, co-authored in his new book. I have a program, a mentor box. I have 1,200, it's 1,300 plus paid students now. So, 1600."

 

[05:23] "All this stuff that I'm going to talk about, Dan, you can do yourself. Uh, meaning like you yourself can go into the ads manager because it's pretty simple to do."

 

[05:32] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Comentário - Estratégia de Empoderamento"

 

NÚMEROS: $5,000 (preço mencionado antecipadamente)

 

VISUAL: Pausa explicativa sobre técnica de empoderamento do cliente e transparência de preço

 

[05:34] "I'm empowering him and his team to be able to do this month, which is the point of—I say my price up front."

 

[05:41] "Third, if you have a team or any current agency that's helping you out, a digital marketer of any kind, make sure that they watch this video as well and see if you can do what I'm essentially going to walk you through step by step in under the next five minutes because I know time is valuable."

 

[05:58] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Comentário - Respeito ao Tempo"

 

NÚMEROS: 5 minutos (duração prometida)

 

VISUAL: Destaque para estratégia de demonstrar respeito pelo tempo do prospect

 

[06:00] "Notice I'm representing and respecting his time here."

 

[06:03] "They're phenomenal, but they're not getting enough views. So, they're getting, for example, 16 views today, 700. You know, this this is as you being the highest paid consultant—"

 

[06:16] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Analytics de vídeos do Dan

 

NÚMEROS: 16 views, 700 views (exemplos de baixo desempenho)

 

VISUAL: Screenshots de métricas reais de vídeos, números de visualizações destacados em vermelho/atenção

 

[06:18] "Which is what he—master closer of high ticket sales. I want you to know that I'd expect to see literally tens of thousands of views per video. Now, all of you—"

 

[06:29] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Comentário - Explicando Relevância"

 

NÚMEROS: Dezenas de milhares (expectativa de views)

 

VISUAL: Pausa para enfatizar o gap entre realidade e potencial

 

[06:31] "Explaining why what I'm talking about matters."

 

[06:34] "So, it lets me know that you have somebody behind the scenes as far as graphic designer, social media marketing agency, maybe that's helping you put—"

 

[06:43] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Comentário - Reconhecendo Investimento Existente"

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Estratégia de reconhecer equipe existente e investimentos já feitos

 

[06:45] "I understand this video will likely be seen by a team. So, I recognize that you're already putting money into this and I'm trying to tell you it comes down to the distribution to get the numbers that you're looking for. So, when I'm talking—"

 

[06:59] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Comentário - Simplicidade na Comunicação"

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Ênfase em usar linguagem que o prospect já entende

 

[07:01] "Make the concept of what you're talking about simple. Use words they already understand."

 

[07:06] "We got to get this pretty looking blazer out here cuz this thing's a monster and we got to get the Bentley video out there to a bunch of people, but they need to be qualified. So, you go into the Facebook app."

 

[07:18] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Facebook Ads Manager - Interface de Targeting

 

NÚMEROS: 160,000 pessoas (tamanho do público), $150k-$500k (renda), $500k-$2M (patrimônio líquido), $100k-$3M+ (ativos líquidos), 18-65 anos

 

VISUAL: Transição instantânea para aba já aberta do Ads Manager, configurações de targeting detalhadas visíveis, múltiplos critérios de segmentação sobrepostos

 

[07:20] "Ads manager. And under the objective type, you click on engagement. Okay, so this is called an engagement campaign. For example, I put together an audience. It's 160,000 people."

 

[07:33] "These are people who make a minimum of 150,000 in active income, targetable in the US between 18 and 65. And of course, we can we can cap that number and we can uh same thing for the bottom there. Whatever age groups you want to go after."

 

[07:48] "Moral of the story is they make 150k to 500k in active income or they have a net worth of 500k to 2 million, but they also have to have liquid assets. So straight up money in the bank, banks, credit card."

 

[08:04] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Comentário - Demonstrando Expertise"

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Pausa para explicar profundidade de conhecimento em targeting avançado

 

[08:06] "I'm explaining the process here. Since this is advertising services, you'd be doing the same for whatever process you want to implement in somebody's business."

 

[08:15] "None of this stuff's going away. So long story short, $100,000 to 3 million plus in liquid assets, plus the active income or net worth, plus the fact they use a premium credit card, black card, black card. Know you're familiar with that."

 

[08:32] "Plus the fact that they're a small business owner."

 

[08:35] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Comentário - Construindo Valor através de Conhecimento"

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Explicação sobre demonstração de expertise técnica e profundidade de segmentação

 

[08:37] "Few things I'm doing here. I'm explaining the brevity and the depth of knowledge that I have on this specific platform to create such a targeted audience of such high-profile people which they likely haven't done before in their own team or as you know Dan being the operator."

 

[08:54] "Uh and I'm showcasing some knowledge here while I'm also explaining the process and what's possible."

 

[09:00] "Also underneath here I can target corporate executives but I don't know if you're looking to coach corporate corporate executives and people that are in um like an executive position if you will rather than just being the business owner itself. And then I targeted entrepreneurship."

 

[09:17] "I looked at your website. I understand that you're, you know, in in the business of teaching experts and business owners, and I understand that you have a webinar. I went through the registration process on this."

 

[09:28] "So, I'm looking to drive you leads."

 

[09:31] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Sites do Dan Lokach abertos em múltiplas abas

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Múltiplas abas do navegador abertas mostrando websites e páginas de registro do prospect, preparação prévia evidente

 

[09:33] "I have all of his websites open so I can quickly reference what he's likely trying to market."

 

[09:39] "This kind of person. So, these 160,000 people, you spend 10 bucks a day targeting your videos towards them first. So the the first portion of the funnel if you will for people who don't know you yet and then one of your audiences you do run towards people who know you."

 

[09:56] "That way you remain omnipresent side in front of them whenever they go onto their uh Facebook and Instagram feed."

 

[10:03] "So long story short, two different two different types of ad sets. Okay, you got the cold audience which is people like this don't know you but they're qualified. Audience number two is people who do know you."

 

[10:15] "How do you find that out? It's a data driven perspective. So now in the ads manager there's this section called the audiences."

 

[10:23] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Comentário - Velocidade de Apresentação"

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Metáfora visual de "quick shooter", ênfase em transições rápidas entre abas

 

[10:25] "Rapid fire. Think of those videos uh where people have the quick shooter on their hip and they just pull it out and go. You want to be as fast as possible in your ability to rotate between tabs. Make sure you have everything readily available just so you can showcase everything with visual aids, transactional um systems."

 

[10:45] "My favorite is engagement though. You can retarget people based on the video view length and their interaction on your Facebook and Instagram page."

 

[10:54] "So, the point of marketing a video towards somebody that is qualified financially, that is technically somebody you'd run ads towards, well, instead of being the digital clipboard salesperson, which is running a direct response campaign where you're walking up like, 'Hey, sign up for my webinar. Hey, sign up for my webinar.'"

 

[11:13] "You know, you can make these people know, like, and trust you first and know that you're the man and really get them a sense of who you are and what kind of value you bring to the table."

 

[11:23] "And after you've targeted them with video content, you then go into the audience section here and you just put them into a list that automatically is updating and it goes back up to 100—"

 

[11:35] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Comentário - Sistema Venus Traffic"

 

NÚMEROS: 100+ (dias de retargeting)

 

VISUAL: Menção a processo proprietário de tráfego

 

[11:37] "Process called the Venus traffic."

 

[11:40] "Watch your videos 25% 50% 75% even 95%. What you do strategically is you pick out about four to five different videos that you want people to watch in order."

 

[11:52] "So people who don't know you at all, walk them through four different strategically chosen videos that add the right perspective to the person. Malcolm Gladwell talks about this in priming which is giving them a context of decision making."

 

[12:08] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Comentário - Construindo Valor da Ideia"

 

NÚMEROS: 4-5 vídeos (sequência estratégica)

 

VISUAL: Estratégia de atribuir autoridade externa (Malcolm Gladwell) para valorizar conceito

 

[12:10] "Make the idea sound bigger than myself. That way I don't take all the credit for it and I can build the value of the idea."

 

[12:18] "See the number right here inside of the audience section and then on top of that you can also put people into a list who have engaged on your actual Facebook page—"

 

[12:28] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Comentário - Demonstrando Possibilidades"

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Ênfase em mostrar todas as capacidades da plataforma

 

[12:30] "Showcasing all of what's possible."

 

[12:33] "Let's say that you're in a position where I know that you have a heavy influencer account."

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Scroll rápido através de lista de clientes de alto perfil, nomes reconhecíveis passando rapidamente

 

[12:40] "So notice I'm also kind of scrolling through my list of clients so they can see the amount of people I've likely done this for. And there's also some big names in that list that help build the authority from associating myself with people I've already worked with. Of course—"

 

[12:56] "Let's say that showing—"

 

[12:58] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Facebook Page Engagement Options

 

NÚMEROS: 1 milhão+ (seguidores Instagram mencionados)

 

VISUAL: Interface mostrando opções de engajamento: visitantes da página, cliques em CTA, interações com posts, mensagens enviadas, posts salvos

 

[13:00] "I want to use as a million people who like his page on um whatchamacallit Instagram. So people who engaged with the page, people who visit the page, people who clicked on a call to action button, interacted with any post or ad, which could just be something in the news feed, uh people who sent the page a message, or people who saved a post."

 

[13:21] "And you can also do a combination of these things. So the point is you can get an extremely in-depth look at exactly who is engaged with your brand from a data driven perspective and then okay now that you—"

 

[13:34] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Comentário - Velocidade e Confiança"

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Nota sobre ritmo acelerado de fala e projeção de confiança

 

[13:36] "Talking fast cuz I respect his time, lower amount of money to build your audience full of qualified—my confidence levels up same as I'm speaking to you—"

 

[13:47] "End up in these lists full of people who have watched a lot in the videos and people who have engaged on Facebook in aggressive amounts and same thing with Instagram those are the people you've—"

 

[13:58] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Comentário - Demonstração Visual"

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Ênfase em mostrar ao invés de apenas falar

 

[14:00] "Everything that I'm showing I'm making sure that I show and visually demonstrate rather than just talk about it."

 

[14:07] "For your webinar and then you do basic retargeting campaigns from there where you're shooting videos that are contextual to where people are stopped at in the process. This increases your conversion rate through the roof across the board for everything that you're running right now."

 

[14:23] "It lowers the results. Notice how I'm rearing into the end of the video."

 

[14:28] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Comentário - Reiterando Resultados"

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Estratégia de fechamento: resumir todos os benefícios possíveis

 

[14:30] "I'm going to reiterate everything that's possible now with the results—charging you a lot to take people off of Facebook or off of Instagram to your website right away, which are always going to charge you a lot."

 

[14:43] "Result number one I talk about is the lowering of the costs for the amount of ad spend and the increase in probability of getting new customers."

 

[14:52] "Lookalike audiences where you can then instead of having to target inside of your cold audiences, you can just run a lookalike audience for the people who are literally the most engaged out of everybody that you have and you're already an influencer inside of the space because you already have a good amount of people that like and engage with your videos and your pages here."

 

[15:12] "So, you'd already have a pretty significant amount of people that you could put into an audience um inside of the audiences section already. And you could bring in a monumental amount of people that are qualified who could—"

 

[15:25] "Engage with your videos first and then be sold on the fact they need to go into your webinar or I like to use the word pulled uh to go into your webinar because they're they're going to want to because we're only going to market to the people who are most engaged from a data driven perspective."

 

[15:42] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Oferta Final"

 

NÚMEROS: $5,000 (preço de consulting)

 

VISUAL: Momento de fechamento, apresentador fazendo oferta direta com preço específico

 

[15:44] "So, I would like to do this for you for $5,000. I would like for you to pay me for Facebook ads, Instagram ads, remarketing. I'd like to be your guy. I'm your expert. I work with personality brands every day of my life. I preach."

 

[16:00] "I'd be more than happy to leverage all my information to you and your team currently and all the tools um that I know on top of this that would help you guys out."

 

[16:10] "More importantly than that, if we can't work together, I love your brand. I love your attitude when it comes to how real you are and what you bring to the marketplace."

 

[16:20] "So, I encourage you use this information inside of your current staff and structure and take action with this stuff because it makes you more money and it's proven."

 

[16:29] "So either way, Dan, appreciate the time. Looking to get that pretty face out there."

 

[16:34] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: N/A

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Apresentador segura novamente a foto impressa do Dan, retomando elemento único de abertura para fechamento memorável

 

[16:36] "Pick up the photo again to make it more unique. Inspired me. Like the Bentley, good peanut butter guts. Good choice. Talk to you again."

 

[16:46] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Resultado Final"

 

NÚMEROS: $5K consulting → $25K hands-on, $75K/mês se $150K/dia, $150K/mês se $300K/dia, Abril/Maio (período de fechamento)

 

VISUAL: Tela final resumindo progressão do negócio e estrutura de pagamento baseada em performance

 

[16:48] "Nice. So yeah, long story short, great video. Ended up getting, like I said, a 5K consulting deal and that turned into a 25K hands-on deal where we do all his paid advertising now."

 

[17:02] "And this was in late April, early May that we landed that client. So long story short, uh this is an incredible opportunity for you to be able to use the same thing with advertising services."

 

[17:14] "I really hope this helped. I'll see you in the next Perfect Code video pitch."

 

 

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

 

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

Deal inicial: $5,000 (consulting)

Deal expandido: $25,000 (hands-on)

Estrutura de performance: $75K/mês se gerar $150K/dia

Estrutura de performance máxima: $150K/mês se gerar $300K/dia

Período de fechamento: Abril/Maio

Duração do relacionamento com Grant Cardone: 13 meses

Faturamento de cliente (Armando): $200 milhões/ano

Cliente Eric Ciri: $150 milhões

Funis construídos para Armando: 27

Estudantes pagos no programa: 1,300-1,600

Tamanho do público targetado: 160,000 pessoas

Renda mínima do público: $150K-$500K

Patrimônio líquido alvo: $500K-$2M

Ativos líquidos alvo: $100K-$3M+

Faixa etária: 18-65 anos

Budget diário sugerido: $10/dia

Views atuais (problema identificado): 16-700 views

Views esperados: Dezenas de milhares por vídeo

Seguidores Instagram do Dan: 1 milhão+

Sequência de vídeos estratégicos: 4-5 vídeos

Percentuais de visualização rastreados: 25%, 50%, 75%, 95%

Período de retargeting: 100+ dias

 

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

 

Técnicas de Pitch em Vídeo:

Imprimir foto do prospect para capturar atenção

Demonstrar pesquisa prévia (assistir vídeos do prospect)

Alinhar-se culturalmente com valores do prospect

Usar Camtasia ao invés de Loom para movimento dinâmico da câmera

Ter todos os materiais preparados e abertos antes da gravação

Transições rápidas entre abas (técnica "quick shooter")

Elementos visuais no background (whiteboard com mensagens)

Mostrar visualmente ao invés de apenas falar

 

Estrutura de Apresentação:

Começar com preço upfront

Estabelecer credibilidade através de clientes anteriores

Formato bullet point: "O que fizemos → Resultado"

Evitar palavras de preenchimento (uh, um, in)

Respeitar o tempo do prospect (prometer 5 minutos)

Reconhecer equipe e investimentos existentes

Empoderar o cliente (mostrar que podem fazer sozinhos)

Usar linguagem simples que o prospect já entende

Reiterar todos os benefícios no final

 

Sistema de Tráfego Venus:

Fase 1: Campanhas de engajamento para públicos frios qualificados

Fase 2: Retargeting para públicos quentes

Sequência de 4-5 vídeos estratégicos em ordem específica

Priming psicológico (conceito Malcolm Gladwell)

Rastreamento por percentuais de visualização (25%, 50%, 75%, 95%)

Segmentação por ações específicas (CTA, mensagens, salvamentos)

Lookalike audiences baseadas em engajadores mais ativos

 

Targeting Avançado no Facebook:

Múltiplas camadas de qualificação financeira

Renda ativa + patrimônio líquido + ativos líquidos

Cartões premium (Black Card)

Pequenos empresários + empreendedores

Exclusão de executivos corporativos (dependendo do objetivo)

Segmentação por engajamento em página

Retargeting contextual baseado em estágio do funil

 

ESTRUTURA:

 

Framework de Vendas:

Captura de atenção (elemento único/visual)

Prova social (clientes anteriores)

Identificação do problema (baixas views)

Apresentação da solução (sistema completo)

Demonstração técnica (mostrar processo)

Benefícios e resultados

Oferta clara com preço

Alternativa (usar informação mesmo sem contratar)

Fechamento memorável

 

Progressão do Deal:

Consulting inicial ($5K)

Upgrade para hands-on ($25K)

Modelo de performance (baseado em resultados)

 

Tipos de Audiência:

Cold Audience: Qualificados financeiramente mas não conhecem o prospect

Warm Audience: Engajaram com conteúdo ou página

Hot Audience: Múltiplas interações e alto engajamento

 

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

 

Estrutura de Precificação:

Consulting: $5,000

Hands-on: $25,000

Performance tier 1: $75,000/mês (quando gera $150K/dia)

Performance tier 2: $150,000/mês (quando gera $300K/dia)

 

ROI e Métricas:

Redução de custo por lead/conversão

Aumento de taxa de conversão em todo o funil

Aumento exponencial de views (de centenas para dezenas de milhares)

Omnipresença no feed do público-alvo

Budget inicial baixo ($10/dia) para construir audiências

 

Investimento em Ads:

$10/dia para campanhas de engajamento inicial

Escalável conforme resultados

Foco em custo de aquisição reduzido através de warming

 

 

DURAÇÃO: ~17 minutos FORMATO: Screencast educacional com análise de case study real (pitch de vídeo para Dan Lokach)
